heading: Allowances: no increase while dependent is entitled to basic pay
label: 421 Allowances: no increase while dependent is entitled to basic pay
text: A member of a uniformed service may not be paid an increased allowance under this chapter, on account of a dependent, for any period during which that dependent is entitled to basic pay under .section 204 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)42037:231(g) (last proviso of last sentence).(last proviso of last sentence), .Oct. 12, 1949, ch. 681, § 102(g)63 Stat. 805The words “of a uniformed service” are inserted for clarity. The words “claiming a dependent as defined in this subsection” are omitted as surplusage. The words “under ” are substituted for the words “for the performance of duty as defined in section 232(e) of this revised title”.section 204 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 421, , , ; , , , provided for pay and allowances of contract surgeons, prior to repeal by , , , eff. . See , Armed Forces.Pub. L. 87–64976 Stat. 479Pub.
